result:
**Goal for Round 7: Add a minimap overlay that shows the full 400x200 grid at a glance when zoomed in, with a viewport rectangle indicating your current position.**

At zoom 2x and 4x, you lose all spatial context — you're navigating blind across an 80,000-cell grid. A compact minimap in the bottom-right corner (rendered with quarter-block characters for maximum density) solves this by showing the entire simulation as a thumbnail with a highlighted rectangle marking the visible area. This directly exploits the zoom/pan viewport system from round 6, making it actually navigable.

Shall I build it?
